title: HaWare Large Stock Pot, 10L 25.5cm Tri-Ply Stainless Steel Soup Pot with Visible Lid for Pasta/Meat, Metal Cooking Induction Stockpot, Suit for All Kitchen Stove Top, Healthy & Non Toxic, Easy Clean
features: PREMIUM MATERIAL: Made of high quality 18/10 stainless steel for inner side without any coating, No need to worry about toxic chemicals released even at high temperature, Rust-resistant and sturdy, Far superior to aluminum or non-stick coating cookware, Durable & safe for long-term use

TRIPLE-PLY STOCKPOT: Specially triple-ply solid construction with multi-clad design can serve lasts longer than only single cladding, High grade 18/10 stainless steel inner layer ensure healthy use, With aluminum core for heating even and fast, Sturdy 18/0 stainless steel outer layer bottom makes it suitable for all your stovetops including induction, gas, electric, ceramic

VISIBLE GLASS LID: Tempered glass lid is easy to monitor the cooking process, The steam escape hole of the lid to avoid water or food boiling over, Riveted metal knob with silicone washers for insulation and easy lifting

EXQUISITE CRAFT: Its sturdy stainless steel handles are riveted for secure and comfortable handling, Smooth edge without sharp spots, Special matte finish inside for avoiding scratches over time, Mirror finish outside make it look stylish and shiny, Easy hand washing and dishwasher safe, saving your time and labor

MEASURING MARKS & LARGE CAPACITY: The 10L soup pot sized 25.4 x 20cm (Dia x H), Large and deep enough to prepare large portions of food for party guests, Built-in measuring markers for easy control of food quantity, No additional use of measuring cups, Perfect for stewing meats, cooking soup, boiling water and also good as a container to store food, Its a great addition in your kitchen
